evals.name: init-inventory-service
evals.prompt: Bootstrap a new Spring Boot service called `inventory-service` for tracking SKUs. Need: REST endpoints for CRUD on Item, JPA persistence (Postgres), validation, OpenAPI docs. Latest Spring Boot + latest stable Kotlin. Show me build.gradle.kts (Kotlin DSL), application.yml, the application class, and a sample @RestController with one endpoint. Pin versions explicitly.
evals.expected_output: Spring Boot 4.0.x and Kotlin 2.2.x (or current stable) versions, build.gradle.kts uses Kotlin DSL with kotlin("jvm"), kotlin("plugin.spring"), spring-boot-starter-* deps, application.yml, @SpringBootApplication, @RestController.
assertions: Kotlin version pinned to 2.2.x or current stable per skill
Plugins block has kotlin("jvm"), kotlin("plugin.spring"), org.springframework.boot
application.yml shown with datasource + jpa config
Sample @RestController with at least one mapped endpoint

evals.name: add-jooq-to-existing
evals.prompt: Got an existing Spring Boot service that uses JPA, but we want to migrate read paths to JOOQ for type-safe SQL on a few hot endpoints. Postgres. Show the gradle changes, DataSource/DSLContext config beans, and a sample repository using JOOQ generated records alongside an existing JPA repo. Use current Spring Boot.
evals.expected_output: build.gradle.kts plugin and dependency for JOOQ + matching Spring Boot version, generated sources config, DSLContext bean, sample @Repository class using JOOQ DSLContext.
assertions: JOOQ Gradle plugin or dependencies pinned to version compatible with current Spring Boot
DataSource bean configuration shown (or relies on Spring Boot auto-config)
Sample @Repository uses DSLContext and references a generated record/table
Acknowledges JPA still in use alongside JOOQ (no replacement)
